name: RebarItemEnumerator
summary: The RebarItemEnumerator class allows to loop through the catalog rebar items.

methods.name: DeleteRebarItem
methods.summary: Delete the RebarItem from the list

params.name: rebarItem
params.doc: item to delete

methods.name: GetRebarHeaderItems
methods.summary: Gets the header items from the rebar catalog header.

methods.name: GetSize
methods.summary: Returns the total amout of items.

methods.name: InsertRebarItem
methods.summary: Insert the RebarItem in to the list

params.name: rebarItem
params.doc: Item to insert

methods.name: ModifyRebarItem
methods.signature: public static bool ModifyRebarItem(RebarItem rebarItem, RebarItem originalRebarItem)
methods.summary: Modify the RebarItem in the list

params.name: rebarItem
params.doc: item to modify

params.name: originalRebarItem
params.doc: original Rebar Item to match

methods.name: MoveNext
methods.summary: Moves to the next item in the enumerator.

methods.name: RebarItemExists
methods.summary: Check RebarItem is available in database file

params.name: rebarItem
params.doc: rebarItem to check with rebar db

returns.doc: True on rebar item exist in data base

methods.name: Reset
methods.summary: Resets the enumerator to the beginning.

methods.name: SelectRebarItem(String, String)
methods.signature: public static RebarItem SelectRebarItem(string Grade, string Size)
methods.summary: Selects a rebar item in the rebar database with the given grade and size.

params.name: Grade
params.doc: The grade of the rebar item to select.

params.name: Size
params.doc: The size of the rebar item to select.

returns.doc: The first RebarItem that matches the conditions.

methods.name: SelectRebarItem(String, Double, Boolean)
methods.signature: public static RebarItem SelectRebarItem(string Grade, double Diameter, bool UseNominalDiameter)
methods.summary: Selects a rebar item in the rebar database with the given grade and nominal diameter.

params.name: Grade
params.doc: The grade of the rebar item to select.

params.name: Diameter
params.doc: The diameter of the rebar item to select.

params.name: UseNominalDiameter
params.doc: If set to false, the item is selected based on the actual diameter. If true, the item is selected based on the nominal diameter.

returns.doc: The first RebarItem that matches the conditions.

methods.name: SelectRebarItem(String, String, Double)
methods.signature: public static RebarItem SelectRebarItem(string Grade, string Size, double BendRadius)
methods.summary: Selects a rebar item in the rebar database with the given grade, size and bending radius.

params.name: Grade
params.doc: The grade of the rebar item to select.

params.name: Size
params.doc: The size of the rebar item to select.

params.name: BendRadius
params.doc: The bending radius of the rebar item to select.

returns.doc: The first RebarItem that matches the conditions.

methods.name: SelectRebarItem(String, String, String)
methods.signature: public static RebarItem SelectRebarItem(string Grade, string Size, string Usage)
methods.summary: Selects a rebar item in the rebar database with the given grade, size and usage.

params.name: Grade
params.doc: The grade of the rebar item to select.

params.name: Size
params.doc: The size of the rebar item to select.

params.name: Usage
params.doc: The usage of the rebar item to select.

returns.doc: The first RebarItem that matches the conditions.

methods.name: SelectRebarItem(String, Double, Double, Boolean)
methods.signature: public static RebarItem SelectRebarItem(string Grade, double Diameter, double BendRadius, bool UseNominalDiameter)
methods.summary: Selects a rebar item in the rebar database with the given grade, nominal diameter and bending radius.

params.name: Grade
params.doc: The grade of the rebar item to select.

params.name: Diameter
params.doc: The diameter of the rebar item to select.

params.name: BendRadius
params.doc: The bending radius of the rebar item to select.

params.name: UseNominalDiameter
params.doc: If set to false, the item is selected based on the actual diameter. If true, the item is selected based on the nominal diameter.

returns.doc: The first RebarItem that matches the conditions.

methods.name: SelectRebarItem(String, Double, String, Boolean)
methods.signature: public static RebarItem SelectRebarItem(string Grade, double Diameter, string Usage, bool UseNominalDiameter)
methods.summary: Selects a rebar item in the rebar database with the given grade, nominal diameter and bending radius.

params.name: Grade
params.doc: The grade of the rebar item to select.

params.name: Diameter
params.doc: The diameter of the rebar item to select.

params.name: Usage
params.doc: The usage of the rebar item to select.

params.name: UseNominalDiameter
params.doc: If set to false, the item is selected based on the actual diameter. If true, the item is selected based on the nominal diameter.

returns.doc: The first RebarItem that matches the conditions.

methods.name: SelectRebarItem(String, String, String, String)
methods.signature: public static RebarItem SelectRebarItem(string Grade, string Size, string Usage, string Code)
methods.summary: Selects a rebar item in the rebar database with the given grade, size, usage and code.

params.name: Grade
params.doc: The grade of the rebar item to select.

params.name: Size
params.doc: The size of the rebar item to select.

params.name: Usage
params.doc: The usage of the rebar item to select.

params.doc: The code of the rebar item to select.

properties.name: Current
properties.summary: Returns a rebar item instance of the current element.
